The '''Ubrikkian Floater-935''' was an offshoot of the [[Ubrikkian Industries/Legends|Ubrikkian]] [[Desert Sail-20 Skiff]].

==Characteristics==
The Floater-935 was a single-occupant vehicle ideal for high altitude. It didn't have any weapons and it was sometimes used in large industrial centers.

==Behind the scenes==
The [[Ubrikkian Industries/Legends|Ubrikkian]] [[Desert Sail-20 Skiff]] is a vehicle once produced by [[Kenner Products|Kenner]] as a Mini-Rig. The offshoot doesn't have the weapons or the sail.
